title: draba surculosa
intro: Draba surculosa, also known as the cushion draba, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba surculosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce the risk of certain infections, and protect against cell damage. Draba surculosa can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
